name: Ari Gambrel Garage Plan - 12x20 Barn-Style Garage with Loft Potential | DIY Shed & Workshop Building Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a high-capacity roofline that increases overhead space and visual appeal.
The 12x20 layout provides ample room for a small vehicle, motorcycle, ATV, tools, or organized lawn and garden equipment storage.
The gambrel roof naturally creates overhead space ideal for a storage loft, seasonal items, workshop shelving, or creative workspace expansion.
Straightforward framing methods and practical dimensions make the Ari garage approachable for both beginner builders and experienced DIYers.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Ari Gambrel Garage - a versatile 12x20 barn-style garage and storage structure designed for efficiency, durability, and classic curb appeal. Featuring the iconic gambrel roof profile, Ari maximizes interior headroom while delivering the timeless charm of a traditional barn-inspired design. With its balanced footprint, practical layout, and DIY-friendly construction, this garage plan blends smart functionality with architectural character. Whether...
